improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-gideon-preview.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access.">
improvements.rationale: These meta tags optimize search engine visibility with a keyword-rich description under 160 characters that highlights the core value proposition and pricing. The Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the free trial offer and clear positioning attracts qualified clicks from the target audience.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business operations. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading reinforces key value props from the site context — instant answers, voice chat, and workspace — while the free trial CTA reduces friction and encourages immediate engagement. The copy is direct, avoids hype, and builds trust through clarity.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose monthly or annual billing—annual saves you 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point for trial users: understanding what comes next. It clearly explains the paywall transition, reinforces value, and highlights both entry pricing and the annual discount—reducing uncertainty and encouraging conversion.
